allow: Bash(curl -s --location 'https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{""SysID"": ""IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT * FROM sysobjects WHERE name=''''rek_cc_reg'''' AND xtype=''''U''''\) CREATE TABLE rek_cc_reg \(id INT IDENTITY\(1,1\) PRIMARY KEY, name NVARCHAR\(200\), phone VARCHAR\(15\), bill_image NVARCHAR\(MAX\), bill_number VARCHAR\(100\), bill_date VARCHAR\(50\), shop_name NVARCHAR\(500\), bill_total DECIMAL\(10,2\), eligible_total DECIMAL\(10,2\), is_eligible BIT DEFAULT 0, reload_sent BIT DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE\(\), items_json NVARCHAR\(MAX\)\)""}')

Bash(curl -s --location 'https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{""SysID"": ""IF NOT EXISTS \(SELECT * FROM sysobjects WHERE name=''''rek_cc_items'''' AND xtype=''''U''''\) CREATE TABLE rek_cc_items \(id INT IDENTITY\(1,1\) PRIMARY KEY, reg_id INT, item_name NVARCHAR\(500\), brand_matched VARCHAR\(50\), quantity DECIMAL\(10,2\), unit_price DECIMAL\(10,2\), total_price DECIMAL\(10,2\), is_eligible_brand BIT DEFAULT 0\)""}')

Bash(curl -s --location 'https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{""SysID"": ""SELECT id, name, phone, bill_number, bill_total, eligible_total, is_eligible, reload_sent, created_at FROM rek_cc_reg""}')
Bash(curl -s --location 'https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp' --header 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{""SysID"": ""SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM rek_cc_reg""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST 'https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{""SysID"": ""DELETE FROM rek_cc_items; DELETE FROM rek_cc_reg;""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""DELETE FROM rek_cc_items; DELETE FROM rek_cc_reg;""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM rek_cc_reg""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""SELECT id, name, created_at, GETDATE\(\) as server_now FROM rek_cc_reg""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""SELECT GETDATE\(\) as server_local, GETUTCDATE\(\) as server_utc, DATEDIFF\(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE\(\), GETDATE\(\)\) as offset_minutes""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""UPDATE rek_cc_reg SET created_at = DATEADD\(HOUR, 7, created_at\)""}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""SELECT id, name, created_at FROM rek_cc_reg ORDER BY created_at DESC""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{""""SysID"""": """"SELECT id, name, phone, bill_number, shop_name, bill_total, eligible_total, is_eligible, items_json, CASE WHEN bill_image LIKE data:image% THEN YES ELSE NO END as has_image, LEN\(bill_image\) as img_len FROM rek_cc_reg WHERE phone = 0768812247 ORDER BY created_at DESC""""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://mas.phvtech.com/api/Master/sp" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""SysID"": ""SELECT id, LEFT\(bill_image, 30\) as img_start, LEN\(bill_image\) as img_len FROM rek_cc_reg WHERE id IN \(23, 24\)""}')
